mapper.sql: select a.application_id as applicationId, a.application_code as applicationCode, a.application_name as applicationName, a.application_type as applicationType, a.classification_level as classificationLevel, a.construction_source as constructionSource, a.application_status as applicationStatus, a.linkage_status as linkageStatus, a.last_alert_time as lastAlertTime, a.project_id as projectId, p.project_name as projectName, a.owner_org as ownerOrg, a.owner_dept_id as ownerDeptId, a.owner_name as ownerName, a.ops_owner as opsOwner, a.vendor_name as vendorName, a.vendor_owner as vendorOwner, a.portal_owner as portalOwner, a.resource_owner as resourceOwner, a.data_owner as dataOwner, a.security_owner as securityOwner, a.access_url as accessUrl, a.tech_stack as techStack, a.resource_summary as resourceSummary, a.network_summary as networkSummary, a.relation_summary as relationSummary, a.deleted_flag as deletedFlag, case when ifnull(alert.open_alert_count, 0) > 0 then '1' else '0' end as hasOpenAlert, ifnull(alert.open_alert_count, 0) as openAlertCount, a.create_by as createBy, a.create_time as createTime, a.update_by as updateBy, a.update_time as updateTime, a.remark from inf_application a left join inf_project p on a.project_id = p.project_id left join ( select application_id, count(1) as open_alert_count from inf_application_alert_event where event_status in ('OPEN', 'ACKED') group by application_id ) alert on a.application_id = alert.application_id

case when d.dependency_type = 'RESOURCE' then case when r.resource_id is null then ifnull(d.dependency_status, 'UNKNOWN') when r.monitor_status = 'CRITICAL' or r.resource_status = 'RECYCLED' then 'BLOCKED' when r.monitor_status = 'WARNING' then 'RISK' when r.monitor_status = 'NORMAL' and r.resource_status in ('IDLE', 'IN_USE', 'CHANGING', 'PENDING_DELIVERY') then 'NORMAL' else ifnull(d.dependency_status, 'UNKNOWN') end when d.dependency_type = 'NETWORK' then case when n.network_id is null then ifnull(d.dependency_status, 'UNKNOWN') when n.security_status = 'CRITICAL' or n.resource_status = 'RECYCLED' then 'BLOCKED' when n.security_status = 'WARNING' then 'RISK' when n.security_status = 'NORMAL' and n.resource_status in ('IDLE', 'IN_USE', 'ALLOCATED') then 'NORMAL' else ifnull(d.dependency_status, 'UNKNOWN') end when d.dependency_type = 'PROJECT' then case when p.project_id is null then ifnull(d.dependency_status, 'UNKNOWN') when p.project_status in ('RUNNING', 'COMPLETED') then 'NORMAL' when p.project_status in ('DRAFT', 'PENDING_ACCEPTANCE') then 'RISK' else ifnull(d.dependency_status, 'UNKNOWN') end when d.dependency_type = 'APPLICATION' then case when app.application_id is null then ifnull(d.dependency_status, 'UNKNOWN') when app.linkage_status in ('BLOCKED', 'RISK') then app.linkage_status when app.application_status = 'ALERT' then 'RISK' when app.linkage_status is not null and app.linkage_status != '' then app.linkage_status else ifnull(d.dependency_status, 'UNKNOWN') end else ifnull(d.dependency_status, 'UNKNOWN') end
mapper.select: where a.application_id = #{applicationId} and a.deleted_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into inf_application ( application_code, application_name, application_type, classification_level, construction_source, application_status, linkage_status, last_alert_time, project_id, owner_org, owner_dept_id, owner_name, ops_owner, vendor_name, vendor_owner, portal_owner, resource_owner, data_owner, security_owner, access_url, tech_stack, resource_summary, network_summary, relation_summary, deleted_flag, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{applicationCode}, #{applicationName}, #{applicationType}, #{classificationLevel}, #{constructionSource}, #{applicationStatus}, #{linkageStatus}, #{lastAlertTime}, #{projectId}, #{ownerOrg}, #{ownerDeptId}, #{ownerName}, #{opsOwner}, #{vendorName}, #{vendorOwner}, #{portalOwner}, #{resourceOwner}, #{dataOwner}, #{securityOwner}, #{accessUrl}, #{techStack}, #{resourceSummary}, #{networkSummary}, #{relationSummary}, #{deletedFlag}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update inf_application set deleted_flag = '1', update_time = sysdate() where application_id = #{applicationId} and deleted_flag = '0'
mapper.select: select count(1) from inf_project where project_id = #{projectId}
select count(1) from inf_resource where resource_id = #{resourceId}
select count(1) from inf_network_resource where network_id = #{networkId}
select count(1) from inf_application where application_id = #{applicationId} and deleted_flag = '0'

select r.rel_id as relId, r.application_id as applicationId, r.project_id as projectId, p.project_code as projectCode, p.project_name as projectName, r.relation_type as relationType, r.active_flag as activeFlag, r.create_by as createBy, r.create_time as createTime, r.update_by as updateBy, r.update_time as updateTime, r.remark from inf_application_project_rel r left join inf_project p on r.project_id = p.project_id where r.application_id = #{applicationId} order by case when r.relation_type = 'PRIMARY' then 0 else 1 end, r.rel_id desc

select r.rel_id as relId, r.application_id as applicationId, r.project_id as projectId, p.project_code as projectCode, p.project_name as projectName, r.relation_type as relationType, r.active_flag as activeFlag, r.create_by as createBy, r.create_time as createTime, r.update_by as updateBy, r.update_time as updateTime, r.remark from inf_application_project_rel r left join inf_project p on r.project_id = p.project_id where r.application_id = #{applicationId} and r.rel_id = #{relId} limit 1

select r.rel_id as relId, r.application_id as applicationId, r.project_id as projectId, p.project_code as projectCode, p.project_name as projectName, r.relation_type as relationType, r.active_flag as activeFlag, r.create_by as createBy, r.create_time as createTime, r.update_by as updateBy, r.update_time as updateTime, r.remark from inf_application_project_rel r left join inf_project p on r.project_id = p.project_id where r.application_id = #{applicationId} and r.project_id = #{projectId} limit 1

select r.rel_id as relId, r.application_id as applicationId, r.project_id as projectId, p.project_code as projectCode, p.project_name as projectName, r.relation_type as relationType, r.active_flag as activeFlag, r.create_by as createBy, r.create_time as createTime, r.update_by as updateBy, r.update_time as updateTime, r.remark from inf_application_project_rel r left join inf_project p on r.project_id = p.project_id where r.application_id = #{applicationId} and r.relation_type = 'PRIMARY' and r.active_flag = '1' limit 1
mapper.update: update inf_application_project_rel set relation_type = 'RELATED', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where application_id = #{applicationId} and relation_type = 'PRIMARY'
update inf_application set project_id = #{projectId}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where application_id = #{applicationId}
mapper.select: select count(1) from inf_application_project_rel where application_id = #{applicationId} and active_flag = '1'

select d.dependency_id as dependencyId, d.application_id as applicationId, d.dependency_type as dependencyType, d.target_id as targetId, d.target_code as targetCode, d.target_name as targetName, d.target_source as targetSource, d.target_key as targetKey, d.dependency_direction as dependencyDirection, d.dependency_role as dependencyRole, d.importance_level as importanceLevel, d.status_link_enabled as statusLinkEnabled, d.alert_link_enabled as alertLinkEnabled, d.dependency_status as dependencyStatus, as runtimeStatus, d.last_sync_time as lastSyncTime, d.target_snapshot_json as targetSnapshotJson, d.create_by as createBy, d.create_time as createTime, d.update_by as updateBy, d.update_time as updateTime, d.remark from inf_application_dependency_rel d left join inf_resource r on d.dependency_type = 'RESOURCE' and d.target_id = r.resource_id left join inf_network_resource n on d.dependency_type = 'NETWORK' and d.target_id = n.network_id left join inf_project p on d.dependency_type = 'PROJECT' and d.target_id = p.project_id left join inf_application app on d.dependency_type = 'APPLICATION' and d.target_id = app.application_id and app.deleted_flag = '0' where d.application_id = #{applicationId} and d.dependency_type = #{dependencyType} and d.target_name like concat('%', #{targetName}, '%') and d.importance_level = #{importanceLevel} order by field(d.importance_level, 'CRITICAL', 'HIGH', 'MEDIUM', 'LOW'), d.dependency_id desc

select d.dependency_id as dependencyId, d.application_id as applicationId, d.dependency_type as dependencyType, d.target_id as targetId, d.target_code as targetCode, d.target_name as targetName, d.target_source as targetSource, d.target_key as targetKey, d.dependency_direction as dependencyDirection, d.dependency_role as dependencyRole, d.importance_level as importanceLevel, d.status_link_enabled as statusLinkEnabled, d.alert_link_enabled as alertLinkEnabled, d.dependency_status as dependencyStatus, as runtimeStatus, d.last_sync_time as lastSyncTime, d.target_snapshot_json as targetSnapshotJson, d.create_by as createBy, d.create_time as createTime, d.update_by as updateBy, d.update_time as updateTime, d.remark from inf_application_dependency_rel d left join inf_resource r on d.dependency_type = 'RESOURCE' and d.target_id = r.resource_id left join inf_network_resource n on d.dependency_type = 'NETWORK' and d.target_id = n.network_id left join inf_project p on d.dependency_type = 'PROJECT' and d.target_id = p.project_id left join inf_application app on d.dependency_type = 'APPLICATION' and d.target_id = app.application_id and app.deleted_flag = '0' where d.application_id = #{applicationId} and d.dependency_id = #{dependencyId} limit 1
select count(1) from inf_application_dependency_rel where application_id = #{applicationId}

select alert_id as alertId, application_id as applicationId, source_type as sourceType, source_object_type as sourceObjectType, source_object_id as sourceObjectId, event_code as eventCode, event_title as eventTitle, event_level as eventLevel, event_status as eventStatus, impact_summary as impactSummary, event_time as eventTime, ack_time as ackTime, resolved_time as resolvedTime, handler_name as handlerName, payload_json as payloadJson, create_by as createBy, create_time as createTime, update_by as updateBy, update_time as updateTime, remark from inf_application_alert_event where alert_id = #{alertId} limit 1
select count(1) from inf_application_alert_event where application_id = #{applicationId} and event_status in ('OPEN', 'ACKED')

select alert_id as alertId, application_id as applicationId, source_type as sourceType, source_object_type as sourceObjectType, source_object_id as sourceObjectId, event_code as eventCode, event_title as eventTitle, event_level as eventLevel, event_status as eventStatus, impact_summary as impactSummary, event_time as eventTime, ack_time as ackTime, resolved_time as resolvedTime, handler_name as handlerName, payload_json as payloadJson, create_by as createBy, create_time as createTime, update_by as updateBy, update_time as updateTime, remark from inf_application_alert_event where application_id = #{applicationId} order by event_time desc, alert_id desc limit 1

select notice_id as noticeId, alert_id as alertId, application_id as applicationId, receiver_name as receiverName, receiver_role as receiverRole, channel_type as channelType, send_status as sendStatus, biz_status as bizStatus, sent_time as sentTime, read_time as readTime, processed_time as processedTime, content_summary as contentSummary, create_by as createBy, create_time as createTime, update_by as updateBy, update_time as updateTime, remark from inf_application_notice_log where application_id = #{applicationId} and biz_status = #{bizStatus} and receiver_name like concat('%', #{receiverName}, '%') order by sent_time desc, notice_id desc
mapper.update: update inf_application_notice_log set biz_status = 'PROCESSING', read_time = ifnull(read_time, sysdate()), update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where alert_id = #{alertId} and biz_status in ('UNREAD', 'READ')

update inf_application_notice_log set biz_status = 'DONE', processed_time = ifnull(processed_time, sysdate()), update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where alert_id = #{alertId} and biz_status != 'DONE'
update inf_application set linkage_status = #{linkageStatus}, last_alert_time = #{lastAlertTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where application_id = #{applicationId}
mapper.select: select d.dependency_type as dependencyType, count(1) as totalCount, sum(case when d.status_link_enabled = '1' and in ('RISK', 'BLOCKED', 'WARNING', 'CRITICAL', 'ABNORMAL') then 1 else 0 end) as abnormalCount, sum(case when d.status_link_enabled = '1' then 1 else 0 end) as statusLinkEnabledCount, sum(case when d.alert_link_enabled = '1' then 1 else 0 end) as alertLinkEnabledCount from inf_application_dependency_rel d left join inf_resource r on d.dependency_type = 'RESOURCE' and d.target_id = r.resource_id left join inf_network_resource n on d.dependency_type = 'NETWORK' and d.target_id = n.network_id left join inf_project p on d.dependency_type = 'PROJECT' and d.target_id = p.project_id left join inf_application app on d.dependency_type = 'APPLICATION' and d.target_id = app.application_id and app.deleted_flag = '0' where d.application_id = #{applicationId} group by d.dependency_type order by totalCount desc, d.dependency_type asc

select d.dependency_id as dependencyId, d.dependency_type as dependencyType, d.target_id as targetId, d.target_code as targetCode, d.target_name as targetName, d.target_source as targetSource, d.dependency_direction as dependencyDirection, d.dependency_role as dependencyRole, d.importance_level as importanceLevel, d.status_link_enabled as statusLinkEnabled, d.alert_link_enabled as alertLinkEnabled, d.dependency_status as dependencyStatus, as runtimeStatus, case when d.dependency_type = 'RESOURCE' then concat(ifnull(r.resource_status, 'UNKNOWN'), '/', ifnull(r.monitor_status, 'UNKNOWN')) when d.dependency_type = 'NETWORK' then concat(ifnull(n.resource_status, 'UNKNOWN'), '/', ifnull(n.security_status, 'UNKNOWN')) when d.dependency_type = 'PROJECT' then ifnull(p.project_status, 'UNKNOWN') when d.dependency_type = 'APPLICATION' then concat(ifnull(app.application_status, 'UNKNOWN'), '/', ifnull(app.linkage_status, 'UNKNOWN')) else ifnull(d.dependency_status, 'UNKNOWN') end as targetStatus, d.last_sync_time as lastSyncTime, d.remark as remark from inf_application_dependency_rel d left join inf_resource r on d.dependency_type = 'RESOURCE' and d.target_id = r.resource_id left join inf_network_resource n on d.dependency_type = 'NETWORK' and d.target_id = n.network_id left join inf_project p on d.dependency_type = 'PROJECT' and d.target_id = p.project_id left join inf_application app on d.dependency_type = 'APPLICATION' and d.target_id = app.application_id and app.deleted_flag = '0' where d.application_id = #{applicationId} order by field(d.importance_level, 'CRITICAL', 'HIGH', 'MEDIUM', 'LOW'), d.dependency_id desc
